parameters.query: SELECT part_id, part_name, machine_id, COUNT(*) AS uses, SUM(quantity) AS total_qty, MAX(consumed_at) AS last_used, EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MAX(consumed_at)))/86400 AS days_since_last_use FROM spare_parts_consumption WHERE consumed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '180 days' GROUP BY part_id, part_name, machine_id ORDER BY uses DESC LIMIT 50;

SELECT machine_id, predicted_failure, severity, COUNT(*) AS n FROM maintenance_tickets WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY machine_id, predicted_failure, severity ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 50;

SELECT component, target_id, COUNT(*) AS attempts, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failed') AS failures, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'escalated') AS escalations FROM recovery_log WHERE occurred_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days' GROUP BY component, target_id ORDER BY failures + escalations DESC LIMIT 50;

parameters.jsonSchemaExample: {"forecasts":[{"part_id":"HYD-VALVE-21","part_name":"Hydraulic valve assy 21","machine_id":"YNC-L6","predicted_failure_date":"2026-06-04","days_until_failure":15,"confidence":0.78,"reasoning":"Consumed 4x in last 60d; same machine had 3 recovery failures last week","recommended_action":"Order 2 units; schedule replacement during shift C","order_quantity":2,"urgency":"high"}]}
